## Release story

Explain the user problem this release changes and the observable outcome.
Avoid a commit-list-only summary.

## Highlights

- Describe one user-visible outcome.

## Upgrade impact

State **No required action** or list exact required steps. Link the migration
and compatibility guides for every breaking behavior.

## Security and trust

Describe permission, local-data, signing, updater, plugin, agent, or diagnostic
boundary changes. Do not include embargoed vulnerability detail.

## Verify this release

- [ ] Stable artifact matrix is complete.
- [ ] `checksums.txt` covers every downloadable artifact.
- [ ] Platform signatures and notarization are verified.
- [ ] GitHub attestations and CycloneDX SBOMs are attached.
- [ ] Fresh install, upgrade, and uninstall paths were smoke-tested.
- [ ] Download, verification, documentation, source tag, and migration links are present.

## Contributors

Credit reviewed community work and link the merged pull requests.
